hero.name: Tobiloba Adedeji
hero.title: Data Analytics & Operations Professional
hero.tagline: Where data meets systems and decisions — building frameworks that help institutions and people grow.

about.bio_1: I work at the intersection of data, systems, and execution. With a background in program and operations management, I transitioned into data analytics after recognizing that the teams that move fastest and smartest are the ones that see their data clearly and design systems intentionally.
about.bio_2: My approach treats data not as a report card, but as a compass — helping organizations ask better questions, allocate resources wisely, and act with confidence.

projects.title: People Pulse (HR) Dashboard
projects.description: An interactive HR analytics solution designed to transform raw employee data into clear, decision-ready insights. Built as a reusable Excel template enabling HR professionals to quickly analyze workforce composition, compensation patterns, and key people metrics.
features: Dynamic filtering by department and role
Real-time metric updates with connected slicers
Headcount, age bands, income & attrition tracking

projects.title: Sales Performance Analysis — Aurum Retail Ltd.
projects.description: An interactive sales dashboard built for evidence-based business strategy, surfacing total sales, profit trends, customer insights, and top-performing products in a clean, decision-ready format.

projects.title: Superstore Sales Dashboard
projects.description: A case scenario project exploring three essential Excel formulas that demonstrate how data professionals deliver critical analysis under pressure — built around a retail superstore dataset.

education.note: Foundation in systems analysis, policy, and human behavior — disciplines that now inform my approach to data and operations.

certifications.name: Excel Skills for Data Analytics & Visualization
